finding: `taskflow pre-close` can suggest validator remediation commands that are not executable in the current CLI surface.
expectedBehavior: Every emitted `requiredCommand` should be runnable as printed, or should point to the known package script when no ATM subcommand exists.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by applying the taskflow auto-evidence package-script mapper to dry-run/pre-close remediation planning, not only execution. Catalog-selected validator hints now surface the mapped executable command such as `npm run check:encoding:touched` when an equivalent package script exists. Validator: `node --strip-types tests/cli/taskflow-auto-evidence.test.ts`.
